description: Strong backend candidate (Ayesha example from brief)
input: Hi, I'm Ayesha. I have 3 years of experience building backend systems in Node.js and Python. I've worked on REST APIs, deployed on AWS, and recently started using LangChain for a personal project. I have a CS degree from FAST. I'm applying for the Backend Engineer role.

My name is Ali Khan. I just graduated from LUMS with a BS in Computer Science. I know basic Python and have done a couple of class projects using Flask. I'm interested in the Backend Engineer position.

I'm Sara Ahmed, a frontend developer with 4 years of experience. I specialize in React.js and Next.js, and I'm proficient in TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Redux. I've built several production web applications and have experience with Cypress for testing. I have a degree in Software Engineering from NUST. Applying for Frontend Engineer.

Hey, I'm Usman Tariq. I've been working as a data engineer for 3 years. I work primarily with Python, SQL, Apache Airflow, and AWS (S3, Glue, Redshift). I've built ETL pipelines processing millions of records daily. I have a BS in Data Science from IBA Karachi. I want to apply for the Data Engineer role.

Hi, I'm Fatima. I have a degree in Fine Arts from NCA. I've been working as a graphic designer for 2 years. I know Photoshop and Illustrator. I'm applying for the Backend Engineer position because I want to switch careers.

description: Borderline candidate - some skills but gaps
input: I'm Hassan Raza. I have 1.5 years of experience doing web development. I've used JavaScript and some Node.js for small projects. I know basic SQL but haven't used any cloud services. I'm self-taught, no formal CS degree. Applying for Backend Engineer.

I'm Dr. Amina Shah. I have a PhD in Computer Science from MIT and 8 years of experience leading backend teams at Google and Meta. I've architected distributed systems at scale using Go, Python, Kubernetes, and Kafka. I'm looking for the Backend Engineer role as I'm relocating.
Hey, I'm interested in the engineering job. I've done some coding and have a degree. I've worked on a few projects. Let me know if you need more info.

description: Frontend candidate applying for wrong role
input: I'm Zain Malik, a frontend specialist with 5 years in React and Vue.js. Strong CSS, TypeScript, and state management skills. I've built design systems used by 50+ developers. BS from GIKI. Applying for Data Engineer role.

My name is Priya Gupta. I completed a 6-month full-stack bootcamp at Codecamp. Before that, I was an accountant for 5 years. During the bootcamp, I built 3 full-stack apps using Node.js, Express, React, and MongoDB. I've also done a freelance project building a REST API. Applying for Backend Engineer.

I'm Bilal Hussain, a backend engineer with 4 years of experience. I'm proficient in Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker, and AWS Lambda. I've recently been working with LangChain and building RAG pipelines. MS in CS from LUMS. Applying for Backend Engineer.

description: Candidate with unrelated experience claiming skills
input: I'm Kamran. I've been managing a restaurant for 3 years. I took an online Python course last month and watched some YouTube videos about APIs. I think I'd be great for the Backend Engineer role because I'm a fast learner.

I'm Nadia Qureshi. I have 5 years of data engineering experience. Expert in Python, SQL, Apache Spark, Kafka, and dbt. I've built data lakes on AWS using S3 and Glue. Previously worked at Careem and Daraz. MS in Data Science from ITU. Applying for Data Engineer.

Hello, I'm Rizwan. I've been freelancing on and off for about 2 years, doing various web development tasks. Some Node.js, some Python scripting, a bit of database work. I don't have a traditional degree but I'm self-motivated. I'd like to try the Backend Engineer position.

Assalam-o-Alaikum, mera naam Hira Fatima hai. I have 3 years of experience in frontend development using React.js, TypeScript, and Next.js. Maine NUST se Software Engineering ki degree ki hai. I've also worked with GraphQL and have experience with React Native for mobile apps. I'm applying for Frontend Engineer position.

description: Candidate with impressive skills but no clear role match
input: I'm Omar Siddiqui. I have 6 years of experience in DevOps and SRE. I work with Kubernetes, Terraform, Jenkins, and AWS. I've managed infrastructure for systems handling 10M+ requests/day. BS in CS from UET. I'm open to any engineering role you have.
